pleasureful-feedback: It was our pleasure assisting you with your query.
tagline: Ask us a question, our support team is pleased to help you.
fill-widget-form-to-start-conversation-w: Please fill out the form below to start chatting with an agent now!

error.server-down: We are experiencing some technical problem with our server. Your chat with agent / BOT has been disabled.
error.get-back-to-you: We will get back to you as soon as issue is resolved.
error.suggestion-when-server-down: However, you can view your chat session.
error.incomplete-required-fields: Please fill all the required fields
error.invalid-format: does not match the required format
error.invalid-password: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
error.required-password-format: Password must be at least 8 characters long
error.html5-not-supported: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

session-end-reasons.agent: session ended because the agent left the conversation
session-end-reasons.customer: session ended because the customer left the conversation
session-end-reasons.force-closed: session ended due to customer's inactivity
session-end-reasons.force_closed: session ended due to customer's inactivity
session-end-reasons.inactivity: session ended due to customer's inactivity
session-end-reasons.network: session ended due to customer's network connectivity issue
session-end-reasons.unknown: session ended due to an unknown or unspecified reason

callback.title: Callback
callback.request-description: Please fill out the form below to setup a callback request.

notification.agents-not-available: No agents are available at the moment
notification.transfering-request-to: Your request is being transferred, please wait!

dialog.end-conversation-confirmation: Are you sure to end the conversation?
